---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Inkling
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?
A clear description of the need, ideally with a concrete example.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see happen? If it touches the DSL, sketch the syntax; if
it's a new notation or export format, describe the expected output.

```ink
# optional: illustrate any proposed DSL syntax here
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — references to other tools, notations, screenshots, or prior art.
